description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The Reviewers play a key role in the process for identifying, analyzing and resolving technical issues like bugs, mistakes and exploits when they arise during the Spell development process. Other stakeholders, including the Spell Crafter and Core
, also play an important role. The technical issue process is outlined here [A.1.
.2.4.7.3 - Process For Handling Technical Issues](2c8e81bf-b79a-486f-80eb-bd9b15464695). All technical issues identified by Reviewers should follow the steps specified in this process
